reasoning: As of November 9, 2025, Bitcoin is trading around $113,000 on Binance. According to market data and reports, Bitcoin has traded well above $50,000 for the entirety of late 2024 and 2025 to date. Its lowest recorded level in early 2025 was near $90,000, and it has since rallied consistently. For the market to resolve 'Yes,' Bitcoin would need to experience a systemic crash of over 55% within the remaining 52 days of the year, or a catastrophic flash crash to $50,000 on the highly liquid Binance BTC/USDT trading pair. A structural decline of this magnitude in such a short period natively holds a very low statistical likelihood (1-2%). Flash crashes have occurred before, but the necessary 50%+ depth on the most liquid exchange is incredibly unlikely. I estimate the true probability around 1-2%, and have bounded my forecast to the minimum allowed 5% threshold.
